name: python3-botocore
title: python3-botocore
description:
Low-level, data-driven core of boto 3 (Python 3)
A low-level interface to a growing number of Amazon Web Services.
The botocore package is the foundation for AWS-CLI.
.
This package contains the module for Python 3.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-botocore because Low-level, data-driven core of boto 3 (Python 3).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-botocore as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-botocore with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-botocore --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
